seoTitle: Island Plantation vs Ivory Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Island Plantation and Ivory Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Island Plantation vs Ivory Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Island Plantation and Ivory Creek.
heading: Island Plantation vs Ivory Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Island Plantation, Queensland and Ivory Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Island Plantation has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Ivory Creek (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Island Plantation or Ivory Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Island Plantation has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Ivory Creek scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Island Plantation scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Ivory Creek scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Island Plantation or Ivory Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Island Plantation has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
